content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +0.97%, BANK NIFTY +0.99%, REALTY +2.69%, METAL +1.46%, AUTO +1.00%. VIX down to 17.94. IT lone laggard. Strong breadth across capital goods (BHEL +12.5%, HAL +5.2%), pharma, and financials. Risk-on day with strong sector rotation post Q4 results.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4%. Current SL 1040 is now 0.6% below CMP 1046.80 — too tight, would stop out on normal intraday wobble. Lowering to 1025 (-2.1% below CMP) gives breathing room while still locking ~4.2% gain vs entry 984. Wait — engine only allows TIGHTENING SL. Current SL 1040 is above entry 984, so lowering is not allowed. Reverting: keep SL at 1040 (already protective of breakeven+gain). Actually proposing HOLD via position_actions instead. Cancelling this MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4% at 1046.80. SL 1040 is tight (0.6% below CMP) but cannot be loosened per engine rules. Target 1110 still 6% away. Bullish Q4 with sub-1% GNPA, RBI easing tailwind. Risk: SL is uncomfortably tight on noise; if it stops out, gain is locked. Acceptable. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.1%. SL 119 (-2.8% below CMP). Gold consolidating below $4,600 spot. Macro hedge thesis intact (Mideast tensions, INR weakness). Not adding, not exiting. SL handles downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.8% at 1818. Current SL 1810 is already at this level — no change. Wait, this is a no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.8%, near 52w high 1851. SL 1810 locks +4.4% gain. Q4 results May 19 = binary event. SL is appropriately tight 0.4% below CMP — accepts that any reversal closes us out near gain. Will reassess closer to results date for explicit pre-event exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8% at 24.12. SL 23.85 (1.1% below CMP). Pharma sector strength continuing. SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8% at 959.30. SL is at entry (944) which is 1.6% below CMP. Per trailing mandate: P&L ≥+2% would trigger move to breakeven; we're at +1.8%, close to threshold. SL already at breakeven — cannot tighten without violating 0.5% trail-gap (959.30*0.995=954.5). Actually 944 SL is fine; 944 to 954 would be a tightening to 0.5% below CMP — too aggressive. Holding values, this is a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8% at 959.30. SL 944 (entry/breakeven, 1.6% below CMP). Strong Q4 (PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr). Brokerage TP 1050 = 9% upside. Letting it run; SL at breakeven preserves capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.5% at 1738. Current SL 1700 = entry. Trailing per mandate: P&L≥2% triggers move above entry. Raising SL to 1710 (1.6% below CMP, locks +0.6%). Stock breaking out to new 52w high (1742), strong services sector momentum. Target 1790 unchanged. New R:R from 1710: 80 reward / 28 risk = 2.86, well above 1.5."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position flat (-0.0%) at 1537. Touched 52w high 1600 then faded to 1524. Q4 results May 8 = binary event in ~4 days. SL 1510 (-1.8% below CMP). Tanker thesis intact. Will reassess pre-results — hold for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.0% at 13684. SL 13400 (-2.1% below CMP). Faded from intraday high 13976 but auto sector strong. April wholesales record. SL adequate; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9% at 10205. Gapped to 10477 then faded to 10201. SL 10100 (-1% below CMP). May 6 board meet = Q4 + buyback + dividend triple-catalyst, only 2 sessions away. SL handles downside. Will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 11,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 4575.00,
      "stop_loss": 4440.00,
      "target": 4790.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defence cap-goods leader breaking out +5.24% on BHEL Q4 read-through. Order book Rs 2.54L cr (~8x revenue). Citi PT 5560 (+22% upside). Entry 4575, SL 4440 (-3% below entry, just below intraday low 4318 buffered), target 4790 (just below 52w high 5165 path). Risk: 135 pts; Reward: 215 pts; R:R = 1.59. Position size: 11 shares × 4575 = 50,325 = 5.0% of capital. Risk per trade: 50,325 × 2.95% = 1485 = 0.15% of portfolio — well within 0.5% budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 240,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 209.00,
      "stop_loss": 202.00,
      "target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM expansion 30bps QoQ, GNPA improved to 3.27% from 4.71%. Breaking 52w high on 8.2x volume — strong institutional accumulation signal. Emkay PT 220 (+5%). Entry 209, SL 202 (-3.3%), target 220 (+5.3%). R:R = 11/7 = 1.57. Position: 240 × 209 = 50,160 = 5% of capital. Lower size given confidence ~0.62 and MFI sector still has 'negative' rating overhang from India Ratings."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results announced TODAY (Apr May 4 board meet). Stock +12.53% intraday post-results — chasing into a binary event print is the failure mode. RSI overbought, +43% in past month already. Pass; would consider on a pullback to 360-365 if sector momentum sustains."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish supplementary research: Q4 PAT -19.3% YoY, mid-single-digit guide, P/E 60x against declining earnings, single-customer concentration risk. The +8.7% move today is reactive bounce off oversold; fundamentals do not support entry. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results board meet TODAY. Binary event — won't enter into print. Plus SEBI Administrative Warning Letter on CMD is governance flag per regulatory due-diligence rule. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KOTAKBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Solid Q4 (PAT +13%, NIM 4.67% sector-leading) but stock down -2.2% on sell-on-news after yesterday's rally. Chart structure unclear — would prefer to see stabilization above 380 before entering. Pass for now."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+6.4% gain. SL 1040 is tight at 0.6% below CMP but cannot be loosened. Accept locked-in gain risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, SL 119 adequate. Macro hedge thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+4.8%. SL 1810 locks gain. Will reassess pre-May 19 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.8%. SL adequate at 23.85."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.8%. SL at breakeven 944. Letting it run toward TP 1050."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "+2.5% on breakout to new 52w high. Trailing SL from 1700 to 1710 to lock small gain while leaving room to run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL 1510. Q4 results May 8. Will reassess pre-event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-1%, SL 13400 protects. Auto sector and Q4 wholesales supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, SL 10100. May 6 triple catalyst. Will reassess tomorrow."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL on pullback to 360-365 if cap-goods momentum continues. KOTAKBANK if it stabilizes above 380. ANANTRAJ pending order at 506 still OPEN — letting it work. Pending: drop the ANANTRAJ order if not filled by EOD given today's REALTY rally has already moved CMP higher.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 47% with 53% cash — reasonable on a high-VIX-collapsing rally day. Adding HAL (5%) and BANDHANBNK (5%) brings deployment to ~57%, still well below 80% cap. Two binary events on calendar within 5 days: BAJAJ-AUTO May 6 (Q4+buyback), GESHIP May 8 (Q4). Both currently sized < 10% of capital with SLs in place. SUNPHARMA May 19 — will exit explicitly closer to date. No same-cluster stacking: HAL is defence (new cluster, no other defence held); BANDHANBNK is private banking (no other bank held). Sector caps respected."
}
